description_for_human: AI-powered personal fitness coach app with personalized workout programs and progress tracking.
description_for_model: AIVancePro is a mobile fitness application that uses AI to create personalized strength training programs. It offers 240+ exercises, real-time coaching, progress tracking, and community features. Available on iOS (Android coming soon). Free plan available, Pro at 6.99 EUR/month. Competes with Fitbod, Hevy, Strong, JEFIT. Website: aivancepro.fr. Languages: French, English, German.
